functionalRequirements.title: Inventory Hold Creation
functionalRequirements.description: The system must place a temporary hold on a specified quantity of an SKU when a user begins the checkout process.
functionalRequirements.expectedOutcome: Available global stock for the SKU is decremented by the requested amount, and a reservation ID is returned.
acceptanceCriteria: If requested quantity exceeds available stock, return 409 Conflict.
Hold must automatically expire and release stock after 15 minutes if not explicitly confirmed.

usability: API error messages must include a localized, human-readable 'message' field for frontend display.
reliability: System must support Multi-AZ active-active failover with zero data loss.

interfaces.name: Checkout Service Gateway
interfaces.description: Primary ingress for cart reservation requests.

interfaces.name: Warehouse Fulfillment Stream
interfaces.description: Broadcasts confirmed reservations for physical picking.

dataModels.description: Tracks ephemeral holds on inventory during the checkout flow.
dataModels.estimatedVolume: 10 million active rows at peak; rapidly churns.

technical: Must utilize Redis for distributed locking to prevent race conditions on inventory counts.
regulatory: Audit logs of all reservations must be immutable and stored in cold storage for 7 years.
business: System must be fully load-tested and signed off by October 1st ahead of holiday traffic.
